title: Frontier Code (AI coding benchmark)
abstract: Tired of optimizing code? Frontier Code (AI coding benchmark) is like your personal trainer, helping you find the most efficient programming solutions! No more banging your head against the keyboard—let AI write your code and enjoy life. Give it a try; with Frontier Code, coding becomes a breeze!
abstract_zh: 你还在为代码优化烦恼吗？Frontier Code (AI coding benchmark) 就像你的私人教练，帮你找到最高效的编程方案！别再对着电脑抓狂了，让 AI 为你写代码，享受生活吧！快来试试，前沿编码，从此不再难！
